nasb.text: then the Lord will drive out all these nations from before you, and you will dispossess nations greater and mightier than you.

esv.text: then the Lord  will drive out all these nations before you, and you will dispossess nations greater and mightier than you.

cnv.text: 耶和華就必從你們面前把這些國民都趕出去，你們就必佔領比你們大比你們強的國民的地。

ccb.text: 耶和华就会为你们赶走那些比你们强大的民族，你们也必占领他们的土地。
